title: Cross-Account Collaboration & Sync for Freelancers and Clients
excerpt:
Description
Many freelancers and agencies use monday.com to manage multiple clients who already have their own monday.com accounts. Currently, we can only invite clients as guests into our workspaces, which doesn’t allow…

posts.author: hannahjohnson24 (Hannah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Many freelancers and agencies use monday.com to manage multiple clients who already have their own monday.com accounts. Currently, we can only invite clients as guests into our workspaces, which doesn’t allow true collaboration.

What’s missing is the ability to share and sync specific boards, dashboards, or workspaces across two separate monday.com accounts. That way, a board could appear natively in both the freelancer’s account and the client’s account, with updates syncing in real time. This would be a huge benefit to the growing freelancer/agency community and make monday.com the go-to collaboration hub for both internal and external teams.

What are you trying to achieve

Why this matters:

Eliminates duplicate work (no more rebuilding or exporting/importing boards).

Gives clients visibility and ownership inside their own accounts.

Saves time and reduces errors for freelancers managing multiple clients.

Encourages more adoption by businesses who want external partners to work seamlessly within their own monday ecosystem.

Possible features:

Share a board/workspace across accounts.

Two-way syncing of updates and tasks.

Granular permission controls to decide what’s shared and what stays private.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hannahjohnson24 ,

Drop in here a potential solution, since the problem is still actual.

With Interactive Gantt Timeline, you can share the Gantt with clients and collaborate directly on it (if you align project timelines and edits with a client).

No client accounts.
No registrations.
No onboarding on their side.

  • Clients leave comments and suggest timeline changes right on Gantt

    leave suggestions2045×1045 312 KB
    Whenever a new suggestion is added, you’ll receive a monday notification and see the details in the item updates.

  • PMs get notification about comments and suggestions, and can test different scenarios, and then approve the appropriate timeline.

    test versions gantt1581×993 212 KB

After approving, new timeline automatically updates the board. Clients are also automatically notified about new comments and approvals.

Live Gantt instead of endless PDFs. Align project changes faster and deliver projects on time.

You can install and test the app on your account.
